f=1 local g g=function(l)local n=0 local p=0 for t=0,3 do local u=e(l,f)n=r(n,s(u,8*t));f=f+1;end;for t=0,3 do local u local v={}local function w(x,y)v[y]=x;return v[y]end local x={}x[1]=1 x[2]=4 x[3]=2 local x=66513 repeat if x>=47386 then if x~=66513 then f=f+1 x=v[x+53370]or w(-22441,x+53370)else u=e(l,f)p=r(p,s(u,8*t))x=v[x+82655]or w(47386,x+82655)end else break end until x==-22441 end;return p*4294967296+n;end;local l l=function(n)local p=0 for t=0,3 do p=r(p,s(e(n,f,f),8*t));f=f+1;end;return p;end;local l l=function(n)local p=0 for t=0,2 do p=r(p,s(e(n,f,f),8*t));f=f+1;end;return p;end;local l l=function(n)local p=0 for t=0,1 do p=r(p,s(e(n,f,f),8*t));f=f+1;end;return p;end;local l l=function(n)local p=0 p=r(p,s(e(n,f,f),8));f=f+1;return p;end;local l l=function(n)local p local r={}local function s(t,u)local v=q(u,u)local t=t+v r[u]=t;return t end local t={}t[1]=4 t[2]=3 t[3]=3 local t=-15166 repeat if t>=44521 then if t<69962 then break else f=f+1 return p;end else p=0 p=e(n,f)t=r[q(t,21365)]or s(69962,q(t,21365))end until t==44521 end;local n n=function(p)local r,s,t,u,v,w,x,y,z,ba,bb local bc={}local bd={}local function be(bf,bg)bd[bg]=bf;return bd[bg]end local bf={}bf[1]=4 bf[2]=4 bf[3]=0 local bf=-48604 repeat if bf<=-19135 then if bf==-48604 then r,s,t,u,v,w,x,y=e(p,f,f+7)f=f+8 bc[3]=y>127 and-1 or 1 z=bc[3]bf=bd[bf+62230]or be(-19135,bf+62230)else ba=(y%128)*16+h(x/16)bb=((x%16)*2^48+w*2^40+v*2^32+u*2^24+t*2^16+s*2^8+r)bf=bd[bf+14173]or be(24559,bf+14173)end else if bf~=88749 then if ba==0 then if bb==0 then return z*0;else return z*bb*2^(-1022-52);end;elseif ba==2047 then if bb==0 then return z*(1/0);else return 0/0;end;end;bb=bb+2^52 return z*bb*2^(ba-1023-52);else break end end until bf==88749 end;local p p=function(r)local s,t local u={}local function v(w,x)local y=q(x,x)local w=w+y u[x]=w;return w end local w={}w[1]=4 w[2]=4 w[3]=0 local w=-34474 repeat if w>=43561 then if w<70860 then repeat local r=e(r,f,f)s=s+(r>127 and r-128 or r)*t t=t*128 f=f+1 until(r<128)return s else break end else s=0 t=1 w=u[q(w,35753)]or v(43561,q(w,35753))end until w==70860 end local q q=function(r)local r=p(r)local h=h(r/2)if(r%2)==0 then return h;end;return-h-1;end;local h h=function(r)local r,s,t,u=e(r,f,f+3)f=f+4;return((u*16777216)+(t*65536)+(s*256)+r);end;local r r=function(s)local e,s=e(s,f,f+1)f=f+2;return((s*256)+e);end;local e e=function(s)local t=h(s)local h=h(s)if h==0 then return t;elseif(h>=2147483648)then h=h-4294967296;end;return h*4294967296+t;end;local h h=function(s)local t={[5147]={},[3576]={},[6738]={},[282]={},[2693]={},[7519]={},[100]={},}local u=p(s)local v v={}for w=0,u-1 do local u,x local y={}local z={}local function ba(bb,bc)z[bc]=bb;return z[bc]end local bb={}bb[1]=0 bb[2]=3 bb[3]=0 local bb=77394 repeat if bb>=42247 then if bb==42247 then for bc=1,x do u[bc]=p(s);end;v[w]=u bb=z[bb+18581]or ba(-27279,bb+18581)else y[4]={}u=y[4]x=nil x=p(s)bb=z[bb+44881]or ba(42247,bb+44881)end else break end until bb==-27279 end;t[7820]=v;for u=1,p(s)do o(t[282],u-1,h(s))end;local u=(0)~=(l(s))if u then local u u=p(s)local v v={}local w=0 do for x=1,u do local u,x,y,z local ba={}local function bb(bc,bd)ba[bd]=bc;return ba[bd]end local bc={}bc[1]=4 bc[2]=2 bc[3]=1 local bc=53722 repeat if bc<=-30871 then y=q(s)z=w+y w=z c(v,{x,z})bc=ba[bc+39505]or bb(43365,bc+39505)else if bc<53722 then break else u=l(s)~=0 x=u and 1 or 0 y=nil bc=ba[bc+96027]or bb(-30871,bc+96027)end end until bc==43365 end t[100]=v;end end;t[6738]=l(s);t[6542]=p(s);local c=p(s)local u={}local v=0 for w=1,c do local c,w,x,y,z local ba={}local function bb(bc,bd)ba[bd]=bc;return ba[bd]end local bc={}bc[1]=2 bc[2]=0 bc[3]=3 local bd=81789 repeat if bd>=43799 then if bd<=43799 then break else if bd~=86480 then c=l(s)~=0 w=c and 1 or 0 x=q(s)if bc[9]~=0 then bd=ba[bd+28551]or bb(40343,bd+28551)end bd=ba[bd+83340]or bb(86480,bd+83340)else y=v+x v=y bd=ba[bd+63127]or bb(40343,bd+63127)end end else if bd==-21755 then do o(u,#(u)+1,{w,y,z})end bd=ba[bd+31627]or bb(43799,bd+31627)else z=nil z=l(s)bd=ba[bd+14775]or bb(-21755,bd+14775)end end until bd==43799 end o(t,7519,u)local c=p(s)local u={}do for v=0,c-1 do local c=l(s)do repeat if(c==0)then local w=l(s)if not((w)~=(0))then local w=p(s)local b=b(s,f,f+w-1)f=f+w;o(u,v,b)end;break end if(c==1)then local b=l(s)if b==1 then o(u,v,q(s))else u[v]=e(s);end;break end if(c==2)then local b=l(s)if b==1 then u[v]=p(s);else u[v]=g(s);end;break end if((3)==(c))then u[v]=n(s);break end if(c==4)then local b b=l(s)do if b==1 then o(u,v,q(s))else o(u,v,n(s))end;end break end if(c==5)then u[v]=not((l(s))~=(1));break end u[v]=nil;until true end end;o(t,3576,u)end t[2693]=(l(s))~=0;local b=p(s)local c={}local e,f,g,n=0,0,0,0 for u=1,b do local b b={}b[6448]=p(s);local p p=not((l(s))~=(1))local v v=l(s)==1 local w w=l(s)==1 local l=l(s)if(1)==(l)then local x x=r(s)local y y={}local z z={}local ba={}local bb,bc,bd=0,0,0 do for be=0,x-1 do local x={}local function bf(bg,bh)x[bh]=bg;return x[bh]end local bg={}bg[1]=4 bg[2]=4 bg[3]=3 local bg=70660 repeat if bg>=60277 then if bg~=70660 then bd=bd+q(s)do y[be]=bb;end o(z,be,bc)bg=x[bg+73802]or bf(27244,bg+73802)else bb=bb+q(s)bc=bc+q(s)bg=x[bg+32818]or bf(60277,bg+32818)end else if bg<=27244 then ba[be]=bd bg=x[bg+51110]or bf(59886,bg+51110)else break end end until bg==59886 end;o(b,7674,y)end b[4404]=z;b[3045]=ba;elseif l==2 then local x x=r(s)local y={}local z={}local ba,bb=0,0 do for bc=1,x do ba=ba+q(s);bb=bb+q(s);y[bc]=ba;z[bc]=bb;end;end o(b,7674,y)b[4404]=z;elseif not((l)~=(3))then local x=r(s)local y={}local z=0 do for ba=1,x do z=z+q(s);y[ba]=z;end;b[7674]=y;end elseif l==4 then local l=r(s)local r={}local x x={}local y={}local z={}local ba,bb,bc,bd=0,0,0,0 for be=1,l do ba=ba+q(s);bb=bb+q(s);bc=bc+q(s);bd=bd+q(s);r[be]=ba;do x[be]=bb;y[be]=bc;end z[be]=bd;end;b[7674]=r;b[4404]=x;o(b,3045,y)b[6218]=z;else do e=e+q(s);end do f=f+q(s);g=g+q(s);end
